code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
end

fn byte_of(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    -1
  end
end

fn process(_ line: String) -> Unit
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  while i < n
    while i < n and is_ws(byte_of(line, i))
      i = i + 1
    end
    if i < n
      mut token = ""
      while i < n and not is_ws(byte_of(line, i))
        token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(byte_of(line, i))}"
        i = i + 1
      end
      match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(v)
        let doubled = v * 2
        if first
          out = "#{doubled}"
          first = false
        else
          out = "#{out} #{doubled}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
  end
  println(out)
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    process(line)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
